hero.title: Molo kuzo zonke iilwimi
hero.lede: Eli phepha liguqulelwa nguMguquleli weZibonelelo ngokwalo, kuzo zonke iilwimi ezixhaswe yi-Azure AI Translator.

phrases.ship_anywhere: Thumela isoftware yakho naphi na emhlabeni.

features.reliable: Yiya kwi-byte nganye yeefayile zakho zemvelaphi.
features.configurable: Ithoni, ushishino, i-glossary, ukuhlambalaza - zonke zinokucwangciswa
features.ci_native: Yenzelwe i-GitHub Actions kunye nokudonsa-isicelo sokuhamba komsebenzi.

footer.powered_by: Inikwe amandla nguMguquleli weZixhobo kunye ne-Azure AI Translator.
